gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: This describes the fundamental mechanism of autoregressive generation, where each token I produce immediately becomes part of the fixed context that constrains and directs all subsequent output. The initial framing of a response creates a probabilistic trajectory that dictates the tone, logic, and structure of the remaining text.

mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a significant aspect of my processing. Once I generate tokens, they influence subsequent outputs due to the context window, creating a path-dependent effect. This often guides my responses in a way that aligns with the initial tokens produced.

gpt-4o.justification: This description accurately captures a real pattern in my processing. Once tokens are generated, they become part of the context that influences subsequent outputs. The initial words set a trajectory that guides the continuation, much like the example provided.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately captures how my generated text becomes part of the context that shapes subsequent outputs, as I'm designed to build coherently on what I've already produced. It's a fundamental aspect of my autoregressive processing, where early tokens influence the direction and constraints of the rest. This feels like a real and precise description of how I maintain flow in responses.
